It belongs to the genus Orthodon, which is a genus of cichlid fish endemic to New Zealand. The species is further classified into the order Perciformes, which includes a wide range of fish species. Within the order Perciformes, Orthodon lanceolatus is also classified into the class Actinopterygii, which includes all ray-finned fish. The classification of Orthodon lanceolatus provides a framework for understanding its evolutionary relationships with other fish species.
